## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between GrowthX and elro's companies for AI-driven content creation and growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX specializes in building high-quality AI content engines for brands, focusing on publisher-like strategies and deep persona understanding](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Their process involves a 6-8 week strategy sprint ($20-30K) followed by a 6-12 month growth execution phase ($9-25K/month)](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [GrowthX uses a combination of AI workflows and human expertise to create, optimize, and measure content performance](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
  - [The company has a global team and works with clients across different time zones using tools like Slack, Notion, and Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Approach to Content Creation

  - [Focus on creating high-quality, valuable content for specific target audiences](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Aim to position clients as publishers in their industry](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Emphasize deep understanding of customer personas, jobs to be done, and motivations](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Use AI workflows combined with human expertise for content creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
  - [Developed fact-checking and review processes to ensure accuracy, especially for technical or regulated industries](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### GrowthX's Engagement Structure

  - [Two-phase approach: Strategy Sprint and Growth Execution](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [Strategy Sprint (6-8 weeks, $20-30K):](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
      - [Develop AI-ready artifacts and context engineering](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
      - [Establish voice, tone, and content roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
      - [Begin creating initial content pieces (e.g., 23 pieces by week 6 for a current client)](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Growth Execution (6-12 months, $9-25K/month):](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
      - [Implement and evolve content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
      - [Scale to daily publishing](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Continuous refinement based on performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)

### Content Performance Measurement

  - [Utilize various tools and metrics:](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
      - [SEO: Google Search Console, Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
      - [GEO (AI content visibility): Partner with Scrunch for citations and placement analysis](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
      - [Monitor referral traffic and indirect effects on brand search and direct traffic](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Acknowledge the complexity of attribution in the evolving AI content landscape](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
  - [Consider incrementality and baseline establishment for performance evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)

### GrowthX's Team and Platform

  - [Editorial-focused team led by experienced professionals (e.g., former TechCrunch editor-in-chief)](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Managing directors with 20+ years of SEO and growth experience](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Managing editors oversee day-to-day content creation and refinement](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Proprietary platform with hundreds of AI workflows for research, content creation, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [Human-in-the-loop approach ensures quality control throughout the process](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)

## Next Steps

  - [elro to consider bringing someone from their e-commerce company for a follow-up discussion](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)
  - [Kyle to send additional materials for elro to review](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting to dive deeper into potential collaboration opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/f44krmZNWyXSCh9CN-mR-55ufTdu123B?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)
